request_body: The dashboard is loading blank after the last update.
team_resolution: Clear the cache and hard refresh; if it persists check the browser console for CSP errors.
kb_article: The post-update blank dashboard is usually a stale service worker; cache-clear resolves it.

request_body: My SSO login is stuck in a redirect loop.
team_resolution: Verify the SAML assertion attribute mapping for NameID and Email; mismatch causes the loop.
kb_article: SSO redirect loops trace back to NameID/Email mapping mismatches in 90% of cases.

request_body: Why are my exports missing the last day of data?
team_resolution: Exports respect the timezone in account settings; UTC versus local can clip the window.
kb_article: Export windows are timezone-bound; verify account TZ matches the requested window.

request_body: The webhook signature is failing verification.
team_resolution: Confirm you're using the raw request body and the active signing secret.
kb_article: Webhook signature failures usually mean the body was JSON-reparsed or an old secret was used.
